title: cyperus politus
intro: Cyperus politus, also known as the yellow grass or umbrella sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus politus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Cyperus politus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
